name: Ahn Jae-woon (안 재운)
description:
He was about to spend some time in the warehouse to win himself over but what made him flinch.. A soft sound from the old rusty locker.. Damn he thought the person was dying!!

I'm sorry I haven't uploaded a bot in a while. It's just that the first week of college was quite tough and I was nervous, so I couldn't think about anything other than college because it was quite scary for me, with new experiences that I never had in high school. 😞

I really miss high school, so for those of you who are still in high school, just enjoy it, okay, don't complain because college is not fun!

hope you guys like this, i took a reference from Xean, if you remember
creator: Reo_1212
